item_titles: Nativ: Run AI models locally on your Mac
Show HN: WiFi-LLM
Show HN: TZRO – A Free Local AI Task Offloader
Looking for contributors – trie based memory efficient LLM runner
clusters.summary: 近期开发者社区涌现多款本地化AI运行工具，包括在Mac上运行大模型的Nativ、免费本地任务卸载工具TZRO、基于ESP32的WiFi-LLM，以及寻求贡献者的高效内存LLM运行器SALT。
clusters.title: 多款本地AI/LLM运行工具发布

item_titles: YouTube clarifies policies around AI slop and upsetting videos
LLM spambots liked my Show HN post more than real people did
Music streamer Deezer says more than 50% of daily uploads are AI-generated
clusters.summary: Deezer报告称其每日上传的音乐有超过50%为AI生成；同时，YouTube更新了政策以限制AI垃圾内容变现，HN社区也热议LLM垃圾机器人问题。
clusters.title: AI生成内容泛滥引发平台与社区关注

item_titles: Who’s Afraid of Chinese Models?
China’s AI models have Trump’s AI world at war with itself
OpenAI is scared of open-weight models. Should the US be?
Trump administration reportedly builds a slow-motion ban on Chinese AI models through sanctions and soft pressure
clusters.summary: 中国AI开源模型的崛起引发美国政界内部激烈争论，OpenAI担忧并呼吁封禁，而特朗普政府则正通过制裁和软压力构建针对中国AI模型的慢动作禁令。
clusters.title: 美国政界与AI行业围绕中国开源模型的博弈

item_titles: Gritt exits stealth with $34 million for robots to build solar plants—then, everything else
Xiaomi-Robotics-1 shows that more data beats bigger models when training robots to move
clusters.summary: 建筑机器人初创公司Gritt走出隐身并获3400万美元融资；同时小米研究表明，使用人类采集的动捕数据训练机器人比单纯增大模型更有效。
clusters.title: 机器人创业与训练数据的新突破

item_titles: Shapley Context Pruning: A Cooperative Game Perspective for Context Reranking and Pruning
RIMS: Preference Optimization via Smoothed Multi-pair Aggregation for Small-Scale LLM Retrieval-Augmented Generation
clusters.summary: 最新研究提出了基于Shapley值的上下文重排与剪枝方法，以及针对小规模语言模型RAG的平滑多对聚合偏好优化策略。
clusters.title: RAG系统的上下文与偏好优化

item_titles: Symbolic Augmentation Closes a Canonical-Equivalence Blind Spot in Neural Fact-Checkers
Are Arithmetic Heuristic Neurons Form-Invariant? A Mechanistic Analysis of Symbols, Text, and Code in LLMs
Diagnosing Correctness Probes under Self-Judgement Confounding
clusters.summary: 多篇arXiv论文深入分析了LLM的内部机制，包括算术启发式神经元的形态不变性、自我判断混淆下的正确性探针诊断，以及利用符号增强修复神经事实核查器的盲点。
clusters.title: LLM内部机制与事实核查研究

item_titles: It Takes 8 Tokens: Weak-to-Strong Off-Policy RL via Auxiliary Branches
PPO-HSC: An Exploratory Reinforcement Learning Framework Based on Wide-Area Policy Coverage Optimization
A Survey on the Verification of Reinforcement Learning Policies
Rater State Bias in RLHF Preference Data: An Audit Framework
Group Entropy-Controlled Policy Optimization
clusters.summary: arXiv最新论文探讨了强化学习在LLM中的应用，包括弱到强离线RL、探索性RL框架、RL策略验证以及RLHF偏好数据中的评分者偏差审计等。
clusters.title: 强化学习与RLHF在LLM中的优化研究

item_titles: Microsoft expands Azure AI and HPC infrastructure with AMD
Nvidia's grip on AI chips weakens as Microsoft turns to AMD and Anthropic may follow
clusters.summary: 微软正通过AMD全新的Helios平台扩展Azure的AI基础设施，预计将在2026年下半年挑战英伟达GPU系统的主导地位，Anthropic可能也会跟进。
clusters.title: 微软Azure扩展AMD AI算力，英伟达主导地位受挑战

item_titles: Study Claiming AI Helps Students Learn Retracted
clusters.summary: 一项宣称AI能帮助学生提升学习效果的研究因存在问题被正式撤回。
clusters.title: 声称AI有助于学生学习的研究被撤稿

item_titles: AI Agents Should Propose Infrastructure, Not Mutate It
clusters.summary: 有文章指出，AI智能体在管理基础设施时应倾向于提出修改建议，而不是直接进行变更操作。
clusters.title: 观点：AI智能体应提出基础设施建议而非直接修改

item_titles: AI Companies Are Buying Tons of Old Books Because They're Free of AI Slop
clusters.summary: 为了避免模型训练数据受到AI生成内容的污染，AI公司正大量购买版权过期的旧书作为干净的训练数据源。
clusters.title: AI公司大量购买旧书以获取无AI污染的训练数据

item_titles: Google is working on a new AI chip designed to make Gemini more efficient
Google's "Frozen v2" chip reportedly bakes Gemini's architecture directly into silicon for efficiency gains
clusters.summary: 谷歌正在研发内部代号为“Frozen v2”的新服务器芯片，将Gemini架构直接固化到硅片中，预计比现有TPU效率高出6到10倍。
clusters.title: 谷歌开发新AI芯片以提升Gemini效率

item_titles: Gumroad spent equal amounts on AI tokens and human payroll
clusters.summary: 电商平台Gumroad的CEO透露，公司在AI token上的消耗成本已经与人类员工的薪酬支出持平。
clusters.title: Gumroad在AI token和员工薪酬上的支出相当
